Dragon Pie: Hello, Have a fun game.
Dragon Pie: Five stone handi's are so daunting, but especially in a slow game in which the opponent has time to not screw up.
C[Oolong4Go: Hi, have a fun game
Dragon Pie: Hello, Have a fun game.
Dragon Pie: Five stone handi's are so daunting, but especially in a slow game in which the opponent has time to not screw up.
C[Dragon Pie: I've got to attack that group in one way or another.  I'll have to remember to remain flexible to survive such a high handi game.
C[Dragon Pie: Testing his connections and attempting to reinforce my groups.
C[Dragon Pie: It's going to be tricky to settle both, but I'm happy to settle one of my groups.  If I can be solid, the weaker player's flaws are more likely to show.
C[Oolong4Go: my flaws a huge and will show up sometime
C[Dragon Pie: Lol.  That was supposed to be in Malkovich Log.  Oh well.
C[Dragon Pie: Keeping him separated and strengthening my stone.  I also considered cutting with a keima, but this is more solid and I'm thin.

C[Dragon Pie: I'll push once more and then it's the shoulder hit.  He has so much cash already.  It makes me want to kill this group, but at the very least, getting some influence and keeping it weak and heavy is vital.  In an even game, I'd be more likely to call it strong enough and wait for an opportunity to attack, but in an even game, there's a chance to have another weakish group just like it on the board and two weakish groups makes each much weaker.
C[Dragon Pie: I really think he must bend at O8. But that'll let me play Q7 and I'm happy about that.  Still going to be a long hard game.
C[Oolong4Go: black has big problems now

C[Dragon Pie: Getting to connect here makes me happy.  His important stones are still captured.  My Q7 stones are the ones that worry me the most these days.  Let's hope he doesn't read anything too severe.
C[Dragon Pie: Because of the fact that he can cut me, he has the option of killing my two cutting stones.  He has to be careful with his corner.
C[Dragon Pie: There is some trickiness for white here.  If he reads right, I think he can blow me up and force a resign.

C[Oolong4Go: just catching up on things from the last couple of days, and saw your blog post about your turn based games turning into blitz games.  I also have problems with this,  when I notice it I try limiting you playing to just two times a day once in the am before starting the rest of the day, and once at night..  this is to keep me from just clicking in moves between other things during the day.
